items.title: The Iran-US war, told in 21 ‘imminent’ ceasefire deals
items.standfirst: A ceasefire deal between the US and Iran was agreed to this morning. It arrives in the wake of Donald Trump's many, many promises that such a deal was just around the corner. The post The Iran-US war, told in 21 ‘imminent’ ceasefire deals appeared first on Crikey.
items.content: A ceasefire deal between the US and Iran was agreed to this morning. It arrives in the wake of Donald Trump's many, many promises that such a deal was just around the corner. The post The Iran-US war, told in 21 ‘imminent’ ceasefire deals appeared first on Crikey.

items.title: US and Iran reach peace deal including Lebanon
items.standfirst: Donald Trump has announced that Iran and the US have reached a peace deal, which will include Lebanon in the ceasefire. Meanwhile, the Socceroos have won their first World Cup opening game in 20 years. The post US and Iran reach peace deal including Lebanon appeared first on Crikey.
items.content: Donald Trump has announced that Iran and the US have reached a peace deal, which will include Lebanon in the ceasefire. Meanwhile, the Socceroos have won their first World Cup opening game in 20 years. The post US and Iran reach peace deal including Lebanon appeared first on Crikey.
